series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to OAC 3745-7-06, applications from individuals seeking to take an examination to become certified to operate a Class I, II, III, or IV water or wastewater treatment plan, collection system or distribution system. The applications contain information about applicants'' educational backgroun and employment history.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office five years, store off-site at records storage facility for 20 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
